blended.narrative: Kicking Horse is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,227 ft. Looking ahead, 19 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 7" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Friday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
